chat.placeholder: What's broken? Tell Noah and hit go.
chat.learnPlaceholder: Paste a link to a guide, or type what you'd like me to know...
chat.question: Question
chat.followUp: Follow up on a previous issue

welcome.subtitleContextual: What's going on? Or check in on something I know about.
welcome.learnGreeting: What would you like me to learn?
welcome.learnSubtitle: Paste a link or just tell me in your words.

sidebar.sessionsEmpty: Sessions will appear here as you use the app.

setup.inviteOptionDesc: From a friend or the Noah team
setup.apiKeyOption: I have an Anthropic API key
setup.errorApiKeyInvalid: That doesn't look like an Anthropic API key. It should start with sk-ant-
setup.keyLocalOnly: Your key is saved locally and never shared.

signIn.trialHint: No passwords — just a magic link.
signIn.checkInbox: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click the link to finish signing in — Noah will pick it up automatically.
signIn.checkSpam: Can't find it? Check your spam folder.
signIn.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signIn.errorBadLink: That sign-in link looks broken. Try again.

subscribe.firstFixBody: Pick a plan and Noah keeps fixing problems for you. No charge today.
subscribe.secondIssueBody: Pick a plan and Noah keeps fixing problems for you. No charge until {date}.
subscribe.paywallBody: Pick up where you left off. $4.99/mo or $50/yr — cancel any time.
subscribe.capHitBody: Keep Noah going — $4.99/mo or $50/yr, cancel any time.
subscribe.trustBadge: $0 today · cancel any time · no auto-charge during trial
subscribe.footnote: $0 today · cancel any time · we'll never charge during your trial.
subscribe.alreadyPaidNote: Already subscribed? Your account will update in a few minutes.
subscribe.fixContinuesNote: Either way, Noah keeps fixing this in the background.

scanReveal.headline: Start your free trial
scanReveal.body: Noah fixes what we found — and stays for whatever's next: storage, Wi-Fi, backups, security.
scanReveal.footnote: $0 today · 7 days free, then {price} · cancel anytime — we'll remind you before it renews

trialEmailNudge.headline: Want a heads-up before your trial ends?
trialEmailNudge.thanks: Got it — we'll send a friendly nudge a day or two before.
trialEmailNudge.invalid: That doesn't look like an email.

billing.linePaidTrial: Trial ends {date} — first charge of {price} then. Cancel any time before to avoid it.
billing.lineCanceled: Access through {date}, then your subscription ends.
billing.linePastDue: Last payment didn't go through. Pop into Manage subscription to update your card.
billing.manageHint: Manage card, invoices, or cancel anytime.
billing.pastDueHint: Update your card to keep Noah running.
billing.canceledHint: Renew anytime — your data stays right where it is.
billing.signInHelp: Type the email you used to subscribe and we'll send a sign-in link. Takes a moment to arrive.
billing.signInInvalidEmail: Hmm, that doesn't look like an email — give it another try.
billing.signInLinkSentHint: Check your inbox when you have a moment. The link works for a few hours and only once — for safety. We'll sign you in the moment you click.

advanced.byokDesc: Route LLM calls directly to Anthropic with your own key. No account, no telemetry, no subscription.

onboarding.greeting: Hi, I'm Noah. What's going on with your {device}?
onboarding.subgreeting: Pick the closest match — you can tell me more in a moment.
onboarding.clarifierOptional: Optional — Noah already knows you picked this. Add detail only if it helps.
onboarding.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

slow.title: My {device} feels slow
slow.hint: e.g. Safari freezes for 10 seconds every time I open a new tab — started yesterday

wifi.title: Wi-Fi or internet issues
wifi.hint: e.g. the Wi-Fi keeps dropping every 10 minutes at home, but my phone is fine

crash.title: An app keeps crashing
crash.hint: e.g. Zoom crashes about 5 minutes into every call

storage.title: Clean up my storage
storage.hint: e.g. {osName} says my disk is almost full and I don't know what to delete

battery.title: Battery drains fast
battery.hint: e.g. I used to get 8 hours, now I'm lucky to get 3

av.title: Mic, camera, or audio
av.desc: Won't work in Zoom or Teams
av.hint: e.g. my mic stopped working in Zoom but other apps hear it fine

sync.title: Files won't sync
sync.hint: e.g. a file I saved on my other device isn't showing up here

other.title: Something else
other.desc: Tell me in your own words

setup.taglines: Find the cause. See the plan. Approve the fix.
$50 a year. About one billed hour.
Describe the problem. Noah names the cause.
Every change logged. Every change undoable.
No tickets, no hold music. Just a fix.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Subscription, appearance, and how to reach a human.
settings.switchPrompt: Want to use your own Anthropic API key instead?
settings.replaceKeyPrompt: Enter a new Anthropic API key to replace the current one.
settings.errorApiKeyInvalid: That doesn't look like an Anthropic API key. It should start with sk-ant-
settings.proactiveDesc: Noah will periodically check your system and alert you if something needs attention. At most once per day.
settings.dashboardDesc: Link this device to a web dashboard to monitor health remotely. Get a code from your dashboard.
settings.autoHealDesc: Let Noah automatically fix detected health issues
settings.autoHealSafety: Uses the same safety checks as manual fixes. Actions that need approval will still ask first.

health.title: Scorecards
health.subtitle: How your device scores across security, updates, and maintenance.
health.runCheckDesc: Checks your firewall, disk encryption, system integrity, and other security settings. Takes a few seconds. Nothing is changed on your device.
health.noDataHint: Click "Run Health Check" to scan your device.
health.fleetCtaDesc: Connect to a fleet dashboard to track health across all your devices.
health.fleetDataDisclosure: This will share your device name, OS, and health scores with your fleet dashboard. No personal files or browsing data.
health.fleetSyncDesc: Health scores sync automatically after each check.
health.exportReport: Download health report as text file
health.footer: Scorecard data stays on your device unless connected to a fleet. Scores are based on automated checks and may not reflect all security settings.
health.autoHealFailed: Auto-heal encountered an issue. Check the session log for details.
health.autoHealAvailable: Noah found issues it can fix

diagnostics.title: Actions
diagnostics.subtitle: Background scans and tasks Noah is working on. Scans run quietly when your computer is idle.
diagnostics.scanFooter: Scan results are used by Noah to give faster, more accurate advice when you ask about disk space, performance, or system health. Data stays on your device.

approval.title: Can Noah do this?
approval.defaultReason: Noah needs your OK to continue.

knowledgePanel.title: Knowledge
knowledgePanel.noKnowledgeDesc: Noah hasn't learned anything about your system yet. Knowledge will build up as you use the app.
knowledgePanel.noEntries: No entries in this tab yet.

changeLog.title: Action Log
changeLog.emptySubtitle: Actions will appear here as the assistant works.
